testcase.name: test_multiply
testcase.failure:
def test_multiply(): > assert calculator.multiply(2, 3) == 7 E assert 6 == 7
tests/test_calculator.py:15: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_divide
testcase.failure:
def test_divide(): > result = calculator.divide(10, 0) E ZeroDivisionError: division by zero
tests/test_calculator.py:20: ZeroDivisionError
